stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A pilot is performing a VFR flight just under the low cloud base following the route above, and at Fruges Windfarm, they get cleared to fly directly to DET VOR/DME. While flying directly towards DET VOR/DME, they realise at 15:00 that the on-board GPS equipment has been showing unreliable indications for a few minutes and becomes available after a while. Which of the following should the pilot do in this case?

1. Tune in to the DET VOR/DME frequency if within radio range
2. Climb to a higher level to increase radio range
3. Follow the calculated heading towards DET VOR/DME
4. Follow the flight legs according to the operational flight plan
5. Orbit and look for the M20 Junction
